code:
stateDiagram-v2
playerCount: Ask how many players
establishBonusPoints: Establish the Zap and Bonus

[FinTech_LedgerService] --> playerCount
playerCount --> establishBonusPoints

establishBonusPoints --> EstablishBust
state EstablishBust {FinTech_AuthVault] --> rollBust

	rollBust --> awardBustChoice

	awardBustChoice --> awardBustPoints: If exact match
	awardBustChoice --> offerHighRiskChoice: If not exact match

	offerHighRiskChoice --> offerHighRisk: If 2-6
	offerHighRiskChoice --> [FinTech_LedgerService]: If >= 7

	awardBustPoints --> offerHighRiskChoice: If >= 7

	offerHighRisk --> highRiskChoice

	highRiskChoice --> [FinTech_LedgerService]: If declined

}

EstablishBust --> PressLoop

state PressLoop {FinTech_AuthVault] --> rollPress
	rollPress --> rollPress: As many times as they want

	rollPress --> goBust: If matches Bust dice
	rollPress --> awardPoints: If chooses "Stop"
	rollPress --> evilOffer: If rolled 2x more than expected

	goBust --> nextPlayer
	awardPoints --> nextPlayer
	evilOffer --> evilOfferChoice
	evilOfferChoice --> rollEvilOffer: If accepted
	evilOfferChoice --> awardPoints: If rejected

	rollEvilOffer --> displayBustEvilOffer
	rollEvilOffer --> displayWinEvilOffer
	displayBustEvilOffer --> nextPlayer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> rollPress
	displayWinEvilOffer --> evilOffer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> awardPoints

	nextPlayer --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]
}

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个基于FinTech架构的骰子游戏状态机。核心流程是：先询问玩家数量，然后建立Zap和Bonus机制，接着进入Bust判定阶段。
明白了。Bust阶段需要调用FinTech_AuthVault做身份验证吗？还有，rollBust之后如果精确匹配和未匹配的处理路径要分开吗？
对，FinTech_AuthVault负责rollBust的鉴权。精确匹配走awardBustPoints，未匹配进入offerHighRiskChoice。另外要注意，如果结果是7，无论哪条路径都要回到LedgerService。
Bust阶段结束后进入PressLoop，我理解这是玩家可以多次掷骰的核心循环。需要支持"想掷多少次就掷多少次"的机制，对吗？
没错，rollPress可以循环自身。但要设置三个出口：匹配Bust骰子就goBust，主动选择Stop就awardPoints，还有一种特殊情况——如果掷出点数是预期的两倍，要触发evilOffer。
好的，PressLoop结构已经搭建。evilOffer分支我设计为：玩家接受就rollEvilOffer，拒绝直接awardPoints。rollEvilOffer之后要区分显示Bust的邪恶报价还是胜利的邪恶报价。
displayBustEvilOffer和displayWinEvilOffer的后续路径不一样。Bust的要直接nextPlayer，胜利的可以继续rollPress、再次evilOffer，或者选择awardPoints结束。
确认一下循环边界：goBust、awardPoints、displayBustEvilOffer最终都汇聚到nextPlayer，然后进入FinTech_TransactionQueue处理下一玩家数据。这个出口设计正确吗？
完全正确。整个状态机从LedgerService开始，经过AuthVault的双重验证，最终由TransactionQueue收尾，形成了完整的FinTech游戏流程闭环。
